<!--
Thanks for opening a PR against ar-agents.

A few quick checks help us review faster:
-->

### What changes

<!-- One short paragraph describing the change. -->

### Why

<!-- The problem this solves, or the user-facing improvement. -->

### Type of change

- [ ] New tool / new package surface
- [ ] Bug fix (no API change)
- [ ] API change (breaking or non-breaking, mark below)
- [ ] Internal refactor / DX (no user-visible impact)
- [ ] Docs only

### Versioning

- [ ] I added a [changeset](https://github.com/changesets/changesets) (`pnpm changeset`) describing user-visible changes for affected packages
- [ ] N/A — internal/docs change with no released artifact

### Tests

- [ ] Existing tests still pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Added tests covering the change (unit / property / integration as appropriate)
- [ ] No tests needed (docs / config / chore)

### Tool manifests

- [ ] Ran `pnpm regen-manifests` if I touched `packages/*/src/tools.ts`

### Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, Fixes #456 — leave empty if none. -->

### Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything worth flagging: tradeoffs taken, follow-ups planned, edge cases that look weird, breaking-change rationale. -->
